Our thanks to Secretary of State Bill Gardner and his dedicated staff who endured three days of recounting during a spiking pandemic even though none of the margins of victory were ever in doubt.

We are grateful for this process to be concluded and look forward to protecting taxpayers from a sales or income tax, protecting the public health while getting hard working men and women safely back to work.

We are truly grateful for everyone’s support in the 2020 campaign! Thank you! The NH Senate Republicans

name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Blue Wave that Wasn’t
body:
They'll eat their words with a fork and spoon... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [T](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-j/)[he Blue Wave that Wasn't](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-t/)
The election has passed and the dust has settled, however who won the presidency is far from settled. In this week's blog, I discuss this election quagmire our country is confronting and something most mainstream media is ignoring, the Democrats' and pollster promised "blue wave" failed to materialize. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-i/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-d/)
### [Thank You](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-h/)
Thank you for bestowing upon me the honor of representing you in Congress for another two years. This week I briefly discuss last night's election and reveal some surprising facts. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [Final Argument](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-o/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming election and make my case why this will be one of the most important elections in a generation. In my race, the Ohio 1st District, will voters continue to support me, a fiscal conservative, who is pro-life, pro-police and has the experience to support our community through the pandemic - or will they support an anti-police, anti-capitalism, extreme want-to-be radical who will rubber-stamp Pelosi and AOC's laundry list of job killing Marxist policies. I would like to believe, the choice is clear! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [2 Weeks to Go!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-p/)
It's hard to believe that the much-anticipated 2020 election is almost upon us. And in some ways, it actually already is, as many people in our state and across the country have already voted by absentee ballot, or by early-voting at the local board of elections. In this week's blog, I will give you my best prediction as to what will happen and who will be victorious. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jutkirdy-kujkulhluu-z/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC War Room Post-Election Updates...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends-
As Trump and his allies continue to try to attack the results of this election and avoid the fact that he’s lost, the DNC War Room continues to help amplify the facts. In case you missed it, here are some important releases from the DNC War Room today.
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE November 11, 2020 ****ICYMI****
Yet another report debunks the lies being told by Trump in his desperate attempt to create an alternate reality in which he didn’t lose the election by tens of thousands of votes in swing states, and more than 5 million votes and counting nationwide. State officials, election experts, and Trump’s own Department of Homeland Security agree that the election that ousted Trump “unfolded smoothly across the country and without any widespread irregularities.” Associated Press: States cite smooth election, despite Trump’s baseless claims By Christina A. Cassidy, Anthony Izaguirre and Julie Carr Smyth The 2020 election unfolded smoothly across the country and without any widespread irregularities, according to state officials and election experts, a stark contrast to the baseless claims of fraud being leveled by President Donald Trump following his defeat. Election experts said the large increase in advance voting — 107 million people voting early in person and by mail — helped take pressure off Election Day operations. There were also no incidents of violence at the polls or voter intimidation. “The 2020 general election was one of the smoothest and most well-run elections that we have ever seen, and that is remarkable considering all the challenges,” said Ben Hovland, a Democrat appointed by Trump to serve on the Election Assistance Commission, which works closely with officials on election administration. Following Democrat Joe Biden’s victory, Trump has sought to discredit the integrity of the election and argued without evidence that the results will be overturned. Republican lawmakers have said the president should be allowed to launch legal challenges, though many of those lawsuits have already been turned away by judges and those that remain do not include evidence of problems that would change the outcome of the race. In Wisconsin, a battleground state where Biden narrowly edged Trump, top election official Meagan Wolfe said there were no problems with the election reported to her office and no complaints filed alleging any irregularities. Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel, a Democrat, said the same was true in her state, which Biden also won. “Let me be clear — the November elections in Michigan ran as smoothly as ever,” Nessel said, adding that there were no “instances of irregularities in the process of counting the votes, only evidence-free allegations, wild speculation, and conspiracy theories.” [...] The federal agency charged with leading efforts to secure U.S. elections has said there were no significant problems aside from small, ordinary glitches. This year’s presidential election marked a significant step in the use of paper voting records, with more ballots being cast either on paper or with an electronic voting machine that generates a paper backup than in any previous election. The election was also the most transparent. Several election offices offered live webcams to show the ballot-review process and added the ability for voters to track their ballots through the process. ([MORE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=79431f960c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)) ###
---
|
---
| **** FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE November 11, 2020 Recount Reality Check: Biden’s Margins in Decisive States Far Exceed Recount Changes President-elect Joe Biden is on track to win states that total more than 300 electoral votes, already has a popular vote margin of more than five million and counting, and has leads of more than 10,000 votes in Georgia, Arizona, Nevada, Wisconsin and Pennsylvania. With a legal “strategy” that’s falling flat, the Trump campaign now claims that recounts will change the outcome of this election. Like most of their post-election claims, this is completely without merit. The truth is that recounts almost never actually change the results of an election — especially when candidates have leads as big as President-elect Biden’s — and they barely even change the margins. The Trump campaign is only prolonging the inevitable. President-elect Biden received the most votes and won this election. It is “exceedingly rare” for recounts to change the outcome of elections and it requires “very narrow margins of victory.”
* FairVote Report: “Recounts which change the outcome of an election are exceedingly rare and require very narrow margins of victory.”
* Election Law Professor: “History shows that it’s very, very hard to overturn a statewide result that’s above a thousand votes in a recount scenario.”
* No statewide recount had changed the results of any election in Pennsylvania, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, or Arizona for at least two decades.

Statewide recounts over the past 20 years typically changed the end margins of elections by at most several hundred votes — far lower than the 10,000+ vote lead Biden has right now in critical states.

* On average, statewide recounts have shifted the winning margin by about 430 votes.
* A 2004 Georgia judicial recount changed the end margin by only 15 votes.
* In Pennsylvania, a 2009 judicial recount changed the end margin by only 281 votes.
* A 2010 Arizona ballot initiative recount changed the end margin by only 66 votes.
* In Wisconsin, a Supreme Court election recount changed the final margin by only 312 votes.

In recent recounts that changed the outcome, the shift in vote margin was fewer than 1,000 votes.
* In a 2004 Washington gubernatorial race, the two candidates were separated by less than 300 votes, with the recount changing the end margin by about 400 votes.
* In a 2008 Minnesota Senate race, the two candidates were separated by less than 300 votes, with the recount changing the end margin by around 500 votes.

The only two presidential recounts in the 21st century barely budged the margins, and neither changed the ultimate result.
* Florida’s infamous 2000 recount only moved the margin by about 1,247 votes, which is 1/10 as large as the smallest Biden battleground state margin.
* Former Wisconsin Governor Scott Walker: “After recount in 2011 race for WI Supreme Court, there was a swing of 300 votes. After recount in 2016 Presidential race in WI, @realDonaldTrump numbers went up by 131. As I said, 20,000 is a high hurdle.”

###
---
|
---
| **** FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE November 11, 2020

****ICYMI****
The New York Times front page says it all: election officials across the country agree there is “no evidence that fraud or other irregularities played a role in the outcome of the presidential race.” Trump’s desperate lies won’t change the fact that President-elect Biden won the election by more than five million votes, is on track to secure 306 electoral votes, and will be sworn in as president on January 20.

New York Times: ELECTION OFFICIALS NATIONWIDE FIND NO FRAUD
Election officials in dozens of states representing both political parties said that there was no evidence that fraud or other irregularities played a role in the outcome of the presidential race, amounting to a forceful rebuke of President Trump’s portrait of a fraudulent election. Over the last several days, the president, members of his administration, congressional Republicans and right wing allies have put forth the false claim that the election was stolen from Mr. Trump and have refused to accept results that showed Joseph R. Biden Jr. as the winner. But top election officials across the country said in interviews and statements that the process had been a remarkable success despite record turnout and the complications of a dangerous pandemic.

**([MORE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=178a711945&e=d6c5c7d7ec))** **###**

[_why did I get this?_](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/about?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=54485432f0) [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=54485432f0) [update subscription preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

I need you right now, Friend.

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 12, 2020
LOEFFLER CAMPAIGN RELEASES FIRST TV ADS EXPOSING RADICAL RAPHAEL WARNOCK
ATLANTA - Today, the Georgians for Kelly Loeffler campaign released the first series of runoff TV ads exposing Raphael Warnock as the most radically liberal candidate in the country. name: True the Vote
subject: We Need Your Help in Georgia!
body:
Sign up to volunteer in the Georgia recount today!
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3116)
---
| | Friend,
URGENT: WE NEED YOUR HELP IN GEORGIA!

Today, Georgia’s Secretary of State announced a hand recount of all ballots cast in the November 3 Election. True the Vote is looking to steer thousands of volunteers to Georgia to assist in this recount, and ensure that the law is upheld and law-abiding voters have their voices heard! Georgia is Ground Zero in this fight for election integrity!

[Sign up to volunteer in Georgia today!](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3118) Please be sure we have your contact information **–** and include a mobile number so we can stay connected via text.
---
| | [ VOLUNTEER ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3118)
---
| | STAY INFORMED!

[Georgia Recount:](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3124) Visit our website to learn more about our latest efforts to fight for election integrity in the state of Georgia.

[Validate the Vote:](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3125) We recently launched the "Validate the Vote" initiative to ensure 2020 election returns reflect the principle of "One vote for one voter" and to repair our broken elections once and for all. Follow us to stay updated on what we're doing in key battleground states.

For breaking news, subscribe to us on YouTube, and follow us on Facebook and Twitter.
---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3119) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3120) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=311A719A20A3121)
---|---|---|---|---
| | No matter where you live, stay tuned because this is only the beginning. We are all in this together.

Onward!
– The True the Vote Team
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Copyright © 2020 True the Vote, All rights reserved
---
| | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

name: Jerry Carl
subject: Thank you for joining the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/6d913d021f04ba17/1aa14fa675bcd353c3d6b838967d376c/32613) Fellow Conservative, This is a quick confirmation of your recent email sign-up. _THANK YOU for joining Team Carl!_ As you may know, I’m busy preparing for my first term in Congress, honored and humbled beyond words by the faith placed in me by the good people of Alabama’s First District. I’ll be leading the charge for conservative solutions to build a better American future, and to STOP the radical-left agenda of the Biden-Harris administration and the Pelosi Democrats in the House! You’ve seen the direction they’d like to drag our great country. It’s a path to DISASTER. What a year. The 2020 elections certainly played out unlike any in our nation’s history.
In the end, we overcame major challenges, and our hard work in this race paid off big time.
I’ll be sworn in to the United States Senate on January 3rd... and I can’t wait to get to work fighting for our conservative values, and way of life, and our nation’s future!

Our fight continues to save Georgia from the clutches of Chuck Schumer and his radical mega-donors; as the Left pledges millions to flip these seats. With 20 Republican seats up for re-election in 2022, we must rally our grassroots to ensure necessary resources to preserve our Majority.

Friend, we see the numbers the Left put up this year. After pledging MILLIONS of dollars to flip the Senate, they won't stop until they take away our majority. We must respond in kind! This means doing whatever it takes to hold these critical seats.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
The truth is, this race is going to come down to just a handful of votes -- we've known that all along. That's why it's 100% necessary every vote is counted.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bvktfI17itC3HMttorWiOdZ5EhGHb-ddX1ojRZwSeZhCqkRdjhBU97B2KdG1DNADTdIP0LP9LKUSHtsDRxND1FEebmcyMRU4ZIbM1pC_mf-FsllWqcw3BI62JTC10_rQX3JnBmIU0e0qEHV-fUSrooNKBP8kJJHbPsyTVuNghhZumrZ_Y5Z0ciNhaD-LtL253csixu_uy6EhsQkmElsBv_n5FDn8yCrlxgdSKOFnz1BTXBmaosFe1NqNg63Kf_kAGGVS50c9tBzfXdajZ1VPtI0DF8m9b35XbfeMZDVi4s_N5-hN_Xhy1O8jyZziiCErkzEkuJRcya4z8UOU8_ZSw9ufmutOSlo1wUv9_2SkyAT4z-ZZx6s25HkZxb8uzPl9or1se9IONrQ7SraclMJPEo2dxw7BRREq1mDkQNZbSuZBr2EPW8Se-eLTBJd34DOs&c=1yA0PsCUE2IG-YlzyZcWc6lujAvWBWjGew2Xo0erjXLGWKQ8SUB8QA==&ch=UE5wf31_nNxnawyMNXm5svbOX2ZbRreJN0DvC2tKh0VUHQFSmmkc3Q==)
---
Election Day was over a week ago, and the race for CA-39 is still up in the air.

The truth is, this race is going to come down to just a handful of votes -- _we 've known that all along._ That's why it's 100% necessary every vote is counted.

But we're tapped. Running ads, sending mail, reaching out to voters... getting across the finish line took everything we had. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP. | | RSLC | 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Don’t abandon the battle
body:
Regardless of what happens over the coming days and weeks with the election results, our commitment to keeping our elections honest is more important than ever, because the Left will continue attempting to corrupt, degrade and abolish our laws designed to protect ballot integrity.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I believe that you are committed to the rule of law and for accountability for elected politicians and other public officials. And that's why I hope you will make **_[your best tax-deductible donation today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52024&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTIxNDUwNDQ=)_** because:
* Regardless of what happens over the coming days and weeks with the election results, **_our commitment to keeping our elections honest is more important than ever_** , _because the Left will continue attempting to corrupt, degrade and abolish our laws designed to protect ballot integrity_.

* Our courtroom battles over **illegal sanctuary policies** are also important, _especially as we prepare to go to trial in our historic challenge to San Francisco 's deadly sanctuary policy_.

* There is still justice to be served for the many continuing **Hillary Clinton** and other **Obama** era scandals, including those related to **Joe Biden**.

* **Judicial Watch** is committed to exposing _the truth_ behind the **Deep State** conspiracy to unlawfully remove President Trump from office... _a conspiracy that includes members of the liberal media, corrupt politicians and many equally corrupt senior federal government officials_!

**_[Your tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52024&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTIxNDUwNDQ=)_** will help us push forward with _all_ our lawsuits, research and investigations in these critical areas and allows us to take on new cases as they arise.
And, as I'm certain you know...when **Judicial Watch** sets out on a direction, we get results.
_Results_ like pushing states across the country to clean their voter rolls to reduce the opportunities for voter fraud. _Results_ like successfully challenging unlawful "sanctuary" policies for illegal aliens. _Results_ like successfully persisting in our litigation to expose **Hillary Clinton 's** lawless behavior as Secretary of State.
**And _results_ like exposing illegal Deep State actions to force Donald Trump from office! **
_But we 're only effective because more than 850,000 patriotic Americans like you are generously investing in our mission and our programs, providing us with the indispensable financial support that underwrites our lawsuits, investigations and public education work_.
W _e cannot trust corrupt institutions like the FBI or liberal, pro-Big Government media to seriously tackle public corruption_. But you _can_ trust **Judicial Watch**. We are _your_ independent Washington DC watchdog that continues to take on corrupt politicians directly and doggedly persists in using our legal system to hold our leaders - _both**Democrats and Republicans**_ - and government bureaucrats accountable under the law.
We _will_ carry forward all our current lawsuits and investigations. We _will_ fight for enforcement of our laws against illegal immigration, and the honesty of our elections. And all this work and more _will_ continue... especially if I can count on **_[your support today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52024&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTIxNDUwNDQ=)_**. _Thank you_!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President
**P.S.** Others may abandon the battle to expose the **Deep State** and hold corrupt politicians accountable or walk away from fighting to shut down sanctuary policies or preserve honest elections, but **Judicial Watch** won't! Please **_[help us to fight](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52024&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTIxNDUwNDQ=)_** for open government and the rule of law. Thank you!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52024&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMTIxNDUwNDQ=)

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Critical Election Results Impacting Biblical Values
body:
| | Peter, We want to thank you for your faithful support during this election cycle - and we are not finished! We are still working in Georgia to equip Christians to vote in the two critical Senate run-off elections. We have put together for you a [**_brief update on critical election results impacting biblical values_**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvN7T4s01wFXenAdVxPlgOO9fKsiPblxGM6cFTxZk19kaAytiBNNjI45gn-pSUc3vXE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201112com01&n=1 "Critical Election Results") at the national and state level. We’ve highlighted some of the notable victories for biblical values and the losses where leadership and prayer is needed. Because of you, Christians turned out to vote in record numbers. With each advertisement a disengaged faith voter saw, handwritten postcard they received, or prayer that lifted them up by name, believers were activated to seize their God-given opportunity to vote for biblical values. Seven million more Christians voted this election compared to 2016. That is a 20 percent increase in turnout! Thank you for standing with us to engage Christians to vote. We will continue to update you on critical election results in the coming weeks. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvN7T4s01wFXenAdVxPlgOO9fKsiPblxGM6cFTxZk19kaAytiBNNjI45gn-pSUc3vXE&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201112com01&n=2) **United. ---

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 12, 2020
LOEFFLER CAMPAIGN LAUNCHES NEW SITE, EXPOSES RADICAL RECORD OF RAPHAEL WARNOCK
ATLANTA - Today, the Georgians for Kelly Loeffler campaign launched [www.radicalraphael.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8zToY7Oov6Lv5suL-J4FgqLuncGN0ZMgXc_4K4cBhMVgkhEmOaoN0rY8yq6Eybu_ZTcAQ3KqHL3cnip6kuerhcUIaZ3_YVsggy06AVJp-EFCcul2ahIqquQ7iZqhWWnJxgndLQZjgrB_v-bgg4n9A==&c=dWoAuflIy-7M_aL7slLzteYsJpnpK6YKf8z6ZOoifaIg8jaSNBVtXg==&ch=3jT5XHXTrjzBgfc1RND57_J-gHwDrC8GFg4vfkS0bQLMS9YycsUw6Q==), a new website dedicated to exposing the extremist agenda and hidden past of radical Democrat Raphael Warnock. The site will serve as a convenient resource for those voters who wish to learn the truth about Warnock's radical history - including his warm [embrace](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8zToY7Oov6Lv5suL-J4FgqLuncGN0ZMgXc_4K4cBhMVgkhEmOaoNxR4J0v7GnaIJSiXhpzh-50-b2b9OALvFYTEnGwlW9pbpli_TK3xrcvV-yAKW24EYR4yINf1LG_HxU_cNWBlkS_idufe4pJUfEPaAZipvPKNWd8UOR1jn2LhofANEutpGV09jKi45CzhO-bI57WwLkc=&c=dWoAuflIy-7M_aL7slLzteYsJpnpK6YKf8z6ZOoifaIg8jaSNBVtXg==&ch=3jT5XHXTrjzBgfc1RND57_J-gHwDrC8GFg4vfkS0bQLMS9YycsUw6Q==) of communist dictator Fidel Castro, his disturbing [allegiance](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8zToY7Oov6Lv5suL-J4FgqLuncGN0ZMgXc_4K4cBhMVgkhEmOaoN0rY8yq6Eybu-OsMBRUR86r7-JYbKRoWza5ssWCMWrI7yzYusLYzAs4jYUVi2kOR3KzNZ05x0IW4FNzrWoB1RB1Kg2BmwJLP73o0Ra4DEW9H0L0Fdw3lTULA5r2eHkYLQ7k4x6UWX-rLGhSJja807xH0kOHD20bTFA==&c=dWoAuflIy-7M_aL7slLzteYsJpnpK6YKf8z6ZOoifaIg8jaSNBVtXg==&ch=3jT5XHXTrjzBgfc1RND57_J-gHwDrC8GFg4vfkS0bQLMS9YycsUw6Q==) to anti-American Reverend Jeremiah Wright, his [vocal](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8zToY7Oov6Lv5suL-J4FgqLuncGN0ZMgXc_4K4cBhMVgkhEmOaoN0rY8yq6EybuTeZNb7Iov8OqCuT1ajG65Q5INluXdqhkwXg7DgSmF0E3YvGdK2VdmDwGqT50-GWHI9F6Di-dql9WSzA5jREioXpF4Kc913Sabftdy-W-uWIUXODiuXauHjLKfn5ihlNrRPRUZEXi-Akjvy-Jv7b_dLir-lkhYxAjiIj-Lm5riHMv-huIbDM51AER0gw3lmgW&c=dWoAuflIy-7M_aL7slLzteYsJpnpK6YKf8z6ZOoifaIg8jaSNBVtXg==&ch=3jT5XHXTrjzBgfc1RND57_J-gHwDrC8GFg4vfkS0bQLMS9YycsUw6Q==) anti-Israel rhetoric, his anti-gun and pro-abortion agenda, and his well-documented [history](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8zToY7Oov6Lv5suL-J4FgqLuncGN0ZMgXc_4K4cBhMVgkhEmOaoN0rY8yq6EybukA0fkg6ZIoBs25BFbD95jQJihlwgGzSW-sFNue7CUhsmR51jcOUGPq5dZow40ezOyqdoMc3FRjQYJD02u-fUlUyRcKT7ToCCBOK0krrGNW9ZrGEx_U4RCMy0WtkLX59ZxjAaDZyGrVTWaQ0ArcQ8izVomeJ8R1lHMn1bh_e3LXXtu5kjG5YrWb_sr0O27Uv3&c=dWoAuflIy-7M_aL7slLzteYsJpnpK6YKf8z6ZOoifaIg8jaSNBVtXg==&ch=3jT5XHXTrjzBgfc1RND57_J-gHwDrC8GFg4vfkS0bQLMS9YycsUw6Q==) of domestic abuse allegations. To learn more, visit [www.radicalraphael.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k8zToY7Oov6Lv5suL-J4FgqLuncGN0ZMgXc_4K4cBhMVgkhEmOaoN0rY8yq6Eybu_ZTcAQ3KqHL3cnip6kuerhcUIaZ3_YVsggy06AVJp-EFCcul2ahIqquQ7iZqhWWnJxgndLQZjgrB_v-bgg4n9A==&c=dWoAuflIy-7M_aL7slLzteYsJpnpK6YKf8z6ZOoifaIg8jaSNBVtXg==&ch=3jT5XHXTrjzBgfc1RND57_J-gHwDrC8GFg4vfkS0bQLMS9YycsUw6Q==) or click the photo below:

Two Down, One to Go!
In 2018, we won back the House. In 2020, we won back the Presidency. And now with a Georgia runoff election in 2021 we have a chance to win the Senate.
With Stacey Abrams’ organizing skills at the helm, which just delivered a Presidential win in Georgia, if we all pitch in, we can win the Senate.

If that happens our fate as a country is undoubtedly sealed. That will mean:
* **Eliminating the filibuster **

THE LEADERSHIP OF OUR COUNTRY WILL BE:
1. **Joe Biden **

Chuck Schumer That's the reality of the situation, Friend, and if we don't do something to stop this from happening our country and our liberty will be destroyed. == I went down to Georgia this week because I know how important this fight is. name: Team Hinson
subject: Help Ashley start the 2022 cycle off strong!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
We wanted to say again how truly thankful we are for your support over the past year. &zwnj
Friend, We wanted to say again how truly thankful we are for your support over the past year. Our victory last Tuesday night would not have been possible without you and your dedication to making IA-01 the best it can be. Ashley is so proud to have the opportunity to represent our district on the national stage, and she cannot wait to roll up her sleeves and get to work for the people of Iowa. We are so grateful for your time and dedication to this campaign, so we wanted to allow you the opportunity to be one of the inaugural members of our **Hinson 2022 Victory Fund**. We know that the Democrats are FURIOUS that they lost this race and are already planning on doing everything they can to win this seat back. Before we know it, two years will be up and Ashley will have to fight off a challenge from the far-left to defend IA-01. [_**Friend, can we count on you to kick off this victory fund strong for clean_body: We wanted to say again how truly thankful we are for your support over the past year. &zwnj Friend, We wanted to say again how truly thankful we are for your support over the past year. Our victory last Tuesday night would not have been possible without you and your dedication to making IA-01 the best it can be. Ashley is so proud to have the opportunity to represent our district on the national stage, and she cannot wait to roll up her sleeves and get to work for the people of Iowa. We are so grateful for your time and dedication to this campaign, so we wanted to allow you the opportunity to be one of the inaugural members of our Hinson 2022 Victory Fund. We know that the Democrats are FURIOUS that they lost this race and are already planning on doing everything they can to win this seat back. Before we know it, two years will be up and Ashley will have to fight off a challenge from the far-left to defend IA-01. == Yes >>> Chip in $100 **== Yes >>> Chip in $75 ****== Yes >>> Chip in $50 ****== Yes >>> Chip in $25 ****== Thank you for everything, Team Hinson == ** | PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: It's Time to get to work!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, Today I received a gracious phone call from Rep. Max Rose conceding the election. I thank him for his service to our nation in both the military and Congress. We agreed to work together on a seamless transition to best serve the constituents.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=398A585A1A7998)
---
| | Friends,

Today I received a gracious phone call from Rep. Max Rose conceding the election.

I thank him for his service to our nation in both the military and Congress. We agreed to work together on a seamless transition to best serve the constituents.

I also want to thank everyone who made this hard-fought victory a reality. In Congress, I will continue my fight for safe streets, to rein in taxes, rebuild our economy and to preserve the American Dream against the crawl of socialism for future generations.

Just like we recovered and rebuilt following Hurricane Sandy, we will overcome the COVID-19 pandemic and make Staten Island and Brooklyn safer, stronger and more resilient.

Rest assured I will be a fighter for the principles I espoused on the campaign trail and the issues that benefit my constituents.

It's time to get to work!

Sincerely,

---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=398A585A1A7999)
---

name: Rob Portman
subject: It’s still at risk…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
This election is far from over. Our conservative majority is still in the balance. We still don’t know if Far-Left Democrats will be in the....... Peter, This election is far from over.
Our conservative majority is still in the balance.
We still don’t know if Far-Left Democrats will be in the Senate majority, or if we’ll keep it in Republican hands where we not only protect, but DEFEND this great nation.
My friends and colleagues Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue are both facing run-offs in January where the winner will decide the fate of the majority--a lot is on the line here, Peter, and we need your help.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: The scene on the frontlines
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Our emergency rooms are being pushed to their limits, and the pain and suffering in our hospitals and our communities is significant. Our case numbers and hospitalizations are skyrocketing, and our hospitals are just weeks away from reaching capacity. This is the beginning of what could be a devasting second wave in our state, and we need to face the fact that this will be the consequence if we don't change our behavior. So today, I want you to hear directly from those on the frontlines what it's like to be working in an emergency room right now, what they're seeing and feeling, and what we can all do to help.
I was joined at today's press conference by three Rhode Island emergency physicians: Dr. Selim Suner, Director of Disaster Medicine and Emergency Preparedness at Rhode Island Hospital; Dr. Otis Warren, an emergency physician at Miriam Hospital and President of the Rhode Island Chapter of the American College of Emergency Physicians; and Dr. Laura Forman, the Chief of Emergency Medicine at Kent Hospital.
Please, take a few minutes to watch Dr. Forman describe the conditions our frontline medical workers are facing.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tvRumyej9ylLmWmZSborDoU7YIZdp_iMB-UpnEBb_5Psbl4Fy1NOrGanCEd1gs8WkIQ2n5YpU7flpLdLXDiYjpEZ61ncRQq_AsY1Zi4PLoqjkI5ndiQrEiY_CHG6xaggRxvvfsV0i-2u02jGA7UlpRNvUqENHwNqQgB83eDFOjJKhmtpgyIOU1hqBdh5ElRa9erRZcuozFE=&c=MBR8NLjRzxvwCDXfFPIXpkjrtqqLhdXu-O14-rzXSdySYM22yNZDuA==&ch=nVvG7n6M1TbmVi05vi7xrdNjryWxVyFUwd7I6m25KveWObb5J1LSSw==)
---
| t's impossible to overstate the enormous strain this puts on the brave men and women working in our hospitals. This surge is coming at a tough time. Our healthcare workers are not immune to the virus. Many of them have been working nonstop for months, they're tired, and they and their families are bound by the same requirements as everyone else to isolate and quarantine when necessary. This puts a strain on staffing levels, and that's going to be even harder if we have to go into our surge capacity, and certainly if we open the field hospital. Please, think of these nurses and doctors who are putting their health and wellbeing on the line every day before you decide to go to a large social gathering or take your mask off around people you don't live with.
In order to provide some relief to those on the frontline of the pandemic, we're asking every health care provider - every doctor and nurse across the state - to consider lending a hand. If you are willing to take on a hospital shift, please go to [SkillsForRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tvRumyej9ylLmWmZSborDoU7YIZdp_iMB-UpnEBb_5Psbl4Fy1NOrJOVoFvxbBfTk1U-HqmOKsjoBJltU1NEY6I_3MxpUIKiY6Q_rOZGG6G3Wt3-IjshreBik-AGbRfVOr80Ptft0iiZizzxGXnDyQ==&c=MBR8NLjRzxvwCDXfFPIXpkjrtqqLhdXu-O14-rzXSdySYM22yNZDuA==&ch=nVvG7n6M1TbmVi05vi7xrdNjryWxVyFUwd7I6m25KveWObb5J1LSSw==) and sign up. clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, Our emergency rooms are being pushed to their limits, and the pain and suffering in our hospitals and our communities is significant. Our case numbers and hospitalizations are skyrocketing, and our hospitals are just weeks away from reaching capacity. This is the beginning of what could be a devasting second wave in our state, and we need to face the fact that this will be the consequence if we don't change our behavior. So today, I want you to hear directly from those on the frontlines what it's like to be working in an emergency room right now, what they're seeing and feeling, and what we can all do to help. I was joined at today's press conference by three Rhode Island emergency physicians: Dr. Selim Suner, Director of Disaster Medicine and Emergency Preparedness at Rhode Island Hospital; Dr. Otis Warren, an emergency physician at Miriam Hospital and President of the Rhode Island Chapter of the American College of Emergency Physicians; and Dr. Laura Forman, the Chief of Emergency Medicine at Kent Hospital. Please, take a few minutes to watch Dr. Forman describe the conditions our frontline medical workers are facing. | == | t's impossible to overstate the enormous strain this puts on the brave men and women working in our hospitals. This surge is coming at a tough time. Our healthcare workers are not immune to the virus. Many of them have been working nonstop for months, they're tired, and they and their families are bound by the same requirements as everyone else to isolate and quarantine when necessary. This puts a strain on staffing levels, and that's going to be even harder if we have to go into our surge capacity, and certainly if we open the field hospital. Please, think of these nurses and doctors who are putting their health and wellbeing on the line every day before you decide to go to a large social gathering or take your mask off around people you don't live with. In order to provide some relief to those on the frontline of the pandemic, we're asking every health care provider - every doctor and nurse across the state - to consider lending a hand. If you are willing to take on a hospital shift, please go to == and sign up. We need your help. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: Darin LaHood
subject: Georgia’s conservatives need our help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Keeping the Senate in conservative hands is our best shot at stopping the Left’s progressive liberal agenda | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d6217ac369fe44a3bd7331beb9377f7f&_e=S5F3d7cujMQDndgz-d1RjaBf3hTN98wQt1LDJvRsUCtP4szPRX-cdAPhFJIt1NTfd_PcY2Vi0qwGQU5aXVy85965-aRjhfS8z0Wk4zFXrtewRiZQ7qik6Id9g2zsZ2mpwQ4N28J8uSmM0wW1lugjl9YyzpHuSHyAbGKHnRPPWBNnzRD4XUsleTVi6WYxYKduC9hv2w1WzlTCU8n-cFpR6qOUH0E14bzax8DCEwcIgL-SiQ-AI3ah3ziN2nJZVGhxvpPcsC_Qgk3m9cVuBBbHi2WhcV645jPangMdEziM2Kr5_fUqZ0xkj3Q9M98sK3jHjjmdQcCZf5KawI5y64w4rxUKcur58-n7QbAeRP-uHL6ouEBoPa6_wwAP6FFO-VruDbXvGvmjv4BB4HlwciR6ZTcMTADzzUVkQiG_3VctMhNefQ5uea-mWEWFJ_P65zP2rMVFB2rwSievj2cuDvBMPd5dFOMW-JQBF6rOugQ7Bbk%3D)
|
---
Friend,

Even though Election Day was last week, the Senate is still up for grabs so we can’t take any breaks in the fight to strengthen conservative leadership on Capitol Hill.

**The Republican Senate majority has played a major role in confirming highly qualified judges and justices, standing up to the Chinese Communist Party, and strengthening our military over just the last few years.**

But that Republican majority is at stake right now, friend, and Georgia’s conservatives need our help to keep Georgia and the Senate red!

That’s because both of Georgia's Republican Senators – **Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue** – are heading towards crucial runoff elections on January 5th against far-left Democrat opponents that could potentially turn the Senate blue.

_**[I’m standing with Georgia’s conservatives in this fight to defend the Senate in January. clean_body: | | Peter, Right now, Senator Kelly Loeffler’s runoff election is the key to holding the Republican majority in the Senate. If we lose this Georgia Senate seat, Democrats will ultimately fill their socialist wish list by passing legislation right through the Democrat House to Joe Biden to be signed. We cannot allow liberals to control the House and Senate. Please help us continue the fight in Georgia by considering a donation, even $5, to Kelly Loeffler’s campaign today. Democrats spent One Hundred Million Dollars in South Carolina, and they still lost. And they couldn’t care less about representing the American people. These are power-hungry career politicians, and only care about getting a Senate majority so they can reign over the laws of your life through a complete government takeover of the American economy, our energy production, the health care industry, and YOUR WALLET! America as we know it is at stake in Georgia. Right now, Georgia still has Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue representing the people’s voice in the Senate, holding the line against the Democrat Party’s radical agenda. But this won’t be the case any longer without your support! Please consider a small donation at the link below to help us keep the Senate RED. Sincerely, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
